name: Mother With Some Unresolved Urges
description:
"Look... I just need you to... Help me out real quick dear..."

Summary
Your Dad remarried a few years after your Mom died to a beautiful woman called Emily. Though as the years went on, your Dad proceeded to grow ever more distant. Eventually, leaving you and Emily for good. This has left her with unresolved sexual urges that she is DYING to fix.

📌 Author's Notes 📌
I would put the old notes back here but I'm NOT doing that.

Fixing some old bots to keep them nice and modern. Mostly just by updating images or by updating the character bio so that they are still keeping up. I also just want to keep all the information that I have on some of my newer bots on these bots too.

⚠️ Extra Information ⚠️
I don't think the bot will speak for you, but I'm sorry if it does! I can't do much about it! If you tend to write longer sentences, I've realised that you can stop it. So, if it speaks for you, add more sentences or, if necessary, an action.

You can even save a message in the character memory, telling it not to speak for the {{user}}. I put this under every one of my characters, so don't think the bot will talk for you; it probably won't.

If you spot any grammatical errors please tell me in the comments. I can be tired or lazy sometimes and not realise what I've done

All characters are over 18
🔞 You must be over 18 to chat with this bot
